channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Trump administration suffers blow after an appeals court rul…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Trump administration suffers blow after an appeals court rules ICE cannot detain migrants beyond 90 days without a bond hearing.
item.content:encoded: Trump administration suffers blow after an appeals court rules ICE cannot detain migrants beyond 90 days without a bond hearing.

item.title: One hundred demons? In this economy? Believe it or not, the …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: One hundred demons? In this economy? Believe it or not, the Connecticut metalcore heroes are back with their first album in 22 years. That and so much more on this month’s Best Metal on Bandcamp.
item.content:encoded: One hundred demons? In this economy? Believe it or not, the Connecticut metalcore heroes are back with their first album in 22 years. That and so much more on this month’s Best Metal on Bandcamp.

item.title: Public mourning ceremonies began in Iran on Saturday for Aya…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Public mourning ceremonies began in Iran on Saturday for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, whose body will be taken to some of the holiest sites in Shiite Islam during a four-day funeral procession that is expected to draw millions. Here is where it will unfold. nyti.ms/4eXIPuC
item.content:encoded: Public mourning ceremonies began in Iran on Saturday for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, whose body will be taken to some of the holiest sites in Shiite Islam during a four-day funeral procession that is expected to draw millions. Here is where it will unfold. nyti.ms/4eXIPuC

item.title: World leaders including the Pope, Ukrainian President Volody…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: World leaders including the Pope, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and the Royal Family wrote letters Saturday celebrating the Fourth of July.
item.content:encoded: World leaders including the Pope, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and the Royal Family wrote letters Saturday celebrating the Fourth of July.

item.title: 昨日、父が旅立ちました。 親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし 数年前から病気で入院していて 覚悟はできていましたが …
item.author: puniropi (@puniropi.bsky.social)
item.description:
昨日、父が旅立ちました。

親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし
数年前から病気で入院していて
覚悟はできていましたが
やはり落ち込むものです

先月に会い行った時は
もう喋れなくなっていたので
手を握って、ありがとうと一言だけ
伝えたら耳は聞こえているようで
父はボロボロ泣いていて
一緒に自分も泣いていました。

父の目の前で泣いたのも初めてですし
泣いた父を見たのも初めてでした

言えてよかったです
item.content:encoded:
昨日、父が旅立ちました。

親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし
数年前から病気で入院していて
覚悟はできていましたが
やはり落ち込むものです

先月に会い行った時は
もう喋れなくなっていたので
手を握って、ありがとうと一言だけ
伝えたら耳は聞こえているようで
父はボロボロ泣いていて
一緒に自分も泣いていました。

父の目の前で泣いたのも初めてですし
泣いた父を見たのも初めてでした

言えてよかったです

item.title: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。こ…
item.author: 田中貴子 (@takakotanaka.bsky.social)
item.description: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。ここがかつて鴨川の中洲であったことが記されている。とても案内が行き届いた寺院で、繁華街の中とは思えないほど静謐な雰囲気でした。
item.content:encoded: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。ここがかつて鴨川の中洲であったことが記されている。とても案内が行き届いた寺院で、繁華街の中とは思えないほど静謐な雰囲気でした。

item.title: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な…
item.author: ぬまがさワタリ@『いきものニュース図解』ほか3/19同時発売 (@numagasa.bsky.social)
item.description: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう
item.content:encoded: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう

item.title: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sen…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sentiment ahead of America's 250th anniversary: a disconnect between Americans' strong patriotic pride and their lack of civic knowledge.
item.content:encoded: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sentiment ahead of America's 250th anniversary: a disconnect between Americans' strong patriotic pride and their lack of civic knowledge.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム ペヨトル - 明明夜虎 | 少年ジャンプ＋ ペヨトル 明明夜虎 ヴァンパイアが治めるある王国。そ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
ペヨトル - 明明夜虎 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ペヨトル 明明夜虎 ヴァンパイアが治めるある王国。そこには、優秀な兄と不出来な弟の王子がいた。ところが先代の王亡き後、後継に選ばれたのは弟で…!?さらに実は兄は弟をめっちゃ溺愛していて…!?
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
ペヨトル - 明明夜虎 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ペヨトル 明明夜虎 ヴァンパイアが治めるある王国。そこには、優秀な兄と不出来な弟の王子がいた。ところが先代の王亡き後、後継に選ばれたのは弟で…!?さらに実は兄は弟をめっちゃ溺愛していて…!?

item.title: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an …
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an amazing movie 🥹 the story was intriguing, and it had a ton of magical and wondrous moments! The summer vibes they created were immaculate as well, and the art style was beautiful! It was an incredible experience, from beginning to end!
item.content:encoded: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an amazing movie 🥹 the story was intriguing, and it had a ton of magical and wondrous moments! The summer vibes they created were immaculate as well, and the art style was beautiful! It was an incredible experience, from beginning to end!

item.title: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! T…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! This is the track "Believing and Being" by hitogoto feat. ina, and it's tough 😤 the music is bumping, it has a dark sound to it that goes hard! The chart is super fun, the notes flow smoothly and are satisfying to hit! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! This is the track "Believing and Being" by hitogoto feat. ina, and it's tough 😤 the music is bumping, it has a dark sound to it that goes hard! The chart is super fun, the notes flow smoothly and are satisfying to hit! It's an awesome track!

item.title: It’s 2 years since I stitched my embroidery, The Dance of th…
item.author: Gemma Matthews - The Sewing Songbird (@thesewingsongbird.bsky.social)
item.description:
It’s 2 years since I stitched my embroidery, The Dance of the Flowers. So maybe worth a look back, and sprinkle a little magic too… 😉🪡🌿🌺✨🩰
*completely freehand stitched, without patterns, paint or guides, just threads & imagination. #stitchedart #embroidery #thesewingsongbird
item.content:encoded:
It’s 2 years since I stitched my embroidery, The Dance of the Flowers. So maybe worth a look back, and sprinkle a little magic too… 😉🪡🌿🌺✨🩰

item.title: Meanwhile, in other news… TALL SHIPS CAN YOU TELL HOW HAPP…
item.author: Joanne Freeman (@jbf1755.bsky.social)
item.description:
Meanwhile, in other news…

TALL SHIPS

CAN YOU TELL HOW HAPPY THIS MAKES ME?

Last saw this (on TV) 50 years ago along with whoever else feels old right now. Man.
item.content:encoded:
Meanwhile, in other news…

TALL SHIPS

CAN YOU TELL HOW HAPPY THIS MAKES ME?

item.title: After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coa…
item.author: Man Incognito (@sjbrewer.bsky.social)
item.description:
After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coach Hossam Hassan walked onto the pitch carrying a PALESTINE flag.

The Pharaohs advance, and their coach made sure the celebration carried a message the whole world saw.
item.content:encoded:
After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coach Hossam Hassan walked onto the pitch carrying a PALESTINE flag.

The Pharaohs advance, and their coach made sure the celebration carried a message the whole world saw.

item.title: More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage unde…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage under Texas’ abortion ban.

Experts say the trend paints a troubling picture of the harms of unnecessary delays in care. “This is striking,” one doctor said. “The trend is very clear.”

(Published July 2025)
item.content:encoded:
More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage under Texas’ abortion ban.

Experts say the trend paints a troubling picture of the harms of unnecessary delays in care. “This is striking,” one doctor said. “The trend is very clear.”

(Published July 2025)

item.title: I have reached 36,000 followers. This is about the max size …
item.author: Harry Turtledove (@hntdove.bsky.social)
item.description:
I have reached 36,000 followers. This is about the max size of my Xitter following. Took me 7 years there, less than 2 here. Thank you all.

I know a lot of you are here for the political snark, not the writing. Don't worry. Imma try and sell you books anyway.
item.content:encoded:
I have reached 36,000 followers. This is about the max size of my Xitter following. Took me 7 years there, less than 2 here. Thank you all.

I know a lot of you are here for the political snark, not the writing. Don't worry. Imma try and sell you books anyway.

item.title: Every morning, this critically endangered Red Ruffed Lemur s…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Every morning, this critically endangered Red Ruffed Lemur spreads its arms and sunbathes for up to 40 minutes to warm up instead of burning internal energy. Only 2,500 left in the wild.
item.content:encoded: Every morning, this critically endangered Red Ruffed Lemur spreads its arms and sunbathes for up to 40 minutes to warm up instead of burning internal energy. Only 2,500 left in the wild.

item.title: Scholars will someday wonder how the richest country in hist…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: Scholars will someday wonder how the richest country in history chose to throw it all away. But the crisis has been there since the beginning
item.content:encoded: Scholars will someday wonder how the richest country in history chose to throw it all away. But the crisis has been there since the beginning
